description: Do not claim a gain until the updated run is compared against the declared baseline under the evaluation protocol.
detection_hint: Find reports, notes, or result summaries that announce improvement without naming the baseline run or metric.
remediation_hint: Add the baseline reference, metric delta, and evaluation command before recording the result as a win.
rerun_hint: Run the declared verification command and update docs/plans/run-log.md with the result.

description: Each active wave should change one bounded training slice instead of mixing architecture, data, infra, and reporting changes together.
detection_hint: Look for active plans or diffs that touch unrelated training surfaces in one wave without an explicit reason.
remediation_hint: Split the work into smaller waves, tighten allowed files, and move deferred changes into the queue.
rerun_hint: Review docs/plans/active-plan.md, update the wave scope, and rerun the listed checks.
